name: Magical Musketeer Wild
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>射</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ワイルド
desc: During either player's turn, you can activate "Magical Musket" Spell/Trap Cards from your hand. If a Spell/Trap Card is activated in this card's column: You can target 3 "Magical Musket" cards in your GY; shuffle all 3 into the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Musketeer Wild" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn, you can activate "Magical Musket" Spell/Trap Cards from your hand. If a Spell/Trap Card is activated in this card's column: You can target 3 "Magical Musket" cards in your GY; shuffle all 3 into the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Musketeer Wild" once per turn.
eff: During either player's turn, you can activate "Magical Musket" Spell/Trap Cards from your hand. If a Spell/Trap Card is activated in this card's column: You can target 3 "Magical Musket" cards in your GY; shuffle all 3 into the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Musketeer Wild" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Allows activation of Spell Cards from the player's hand during the opponent's turn
Allows activation of Trap Cards from your hand
